---
title: "How DraftStack works"
description: "The pipeline from merged pull request to docs pull request."
---

<!-- Generated by DraftStack. Edit the blueprint or regenerate the site to change this file. -->

A merged pull request triggers the GitHub webhook.

DraftStack fetches the diff, builds docs context, plans the smallest safe update, writes candidate files, reviews the result, and stores a suggestion.

Approval creates a branch and draft pull request in the documentation repository.
